---
title: ""
id: ppc
about:
  template: marquee
  #image: img/cover_3d.jpg
  links:
    - text: R语言与统计应用课程网站
      icon: globe2
      href: https://lizongzhang.github.io/r24/
    - text: B站主页
      icon: globe2
      href: https://space.bilibili.com/590872906
    - text: Email   
      icon: envelope
      href: mailto:lizongzhang9@qq.com
---

:::{#ppc style="color:#044875"}
欢迎访问《经济计量学》课程网站！

:::

# 教材

-   古扎拉蒂，经济计量学精要(第4版), 机械工业出版社, 2010.

-   Gujarati, Damodar N. Essentials of econometrics, the 4th edition. McGraw-Hill/Irwin, 2009.

<img src="img/download.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[下载教材及数据文件](https://pan.baidu.com/s/10NhrQ18BG0888OkKMV6U-g?pwd=6666)

#  教学软件

## 基础必修

-   <img src="img/link.png"  style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px"> Eviews  <https://eviews.com/home.html>

## 进阶选修

-   <img src="img/link.png"  style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px"> R  <https://www.r-project.org/>{target="_blank"}

-   <img src="img/link.png"  style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">R Studio <https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/>{target="_blank"}


#  软件准备

## Eviews12学生版下载

<img src="img/link.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">申请Eviews12学生版序列号 <http://register1.eviews.com/Lite/>

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[如何申请免费的Eviews12学生版？](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Sd4y1371P/)

## R和R Studio的的安装

<img src="img/video.png"  style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[R和R Studio的下载](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1334y1y7U5/){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/video.png"  style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[R和RStudio的安装](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1eR4y1V7uW/){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/video.png"  style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[不用安装就能用的RStudio------RStudio
                Cloud](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1zY4y1M7HX/){target="_blank"}(若无法安装R和R Studio, 请看此视频)


#   参考书

-   <img src="img/download.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[百度网盘] <https://pan.baidu.com/s/1ZtOu4_WJEAhUqnFlArKhPQ?pwd=6666>  

-   QQ群：提交作业，提问答疑

# 课程考核

-   平时成绩：50%

    -   个人作业：20%
    
    -   小组作业：15%  

    -   测验：5%    

    -   考勤： 10%

-   期末考试：50%

<div style="text-align: center;">![](img/bili_up.jpg){width=10%}</div>

<div style="position: fixed; bottom: 10px; right: 70px; z-index: 1000;">

   <a href='http://www.freevisitorcounters.com'>click here</a> <script type='text/javascript' src='https://www.freevisitorcounters.com/auth.php?id=a1b2bcf47de785ab152ba2b2353aa09bd4f80670'></script>
  <script type="text/javascript" src="https://www.freevisitorcounters.com/en/home/counter/1174168/t/5"></script>

</div>
